headline: Jim Cramer on Honeywell International: “We Want to Own It Right Into the Split, But Be Aware It’s Had a Big Run”
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer gave his opinions. During the episode, a caller inquired if the company’s parts that it spins off will be better than the whole, and Cramer replied: Alright, it’s a great question. Now, here’s the issue. It just moved. headline: Stocks to Watch Monday: Moderna, Live Nation, Pfizer, Hims & Hers
summary: ↘️ Carnival (CCL), American Airlines (AAL) and United Airlines (UAL): Carriers and cruise operators are expected to face higher fuel costs due to the energy-price surge. Shares fell in premarket trading.

headline: Distributed Control Systems Market Competitive Benchmark Report 2025: Key Players Analysis, Profiles, Product Developments, Mergers, Strategic Collaborations, and Revenue Forecast Insights to 2033
summary: The distributed control systems (DCS) market is projected to grow significantly, reaching an estimated value of $33.63 billion by 2033, fueled by a CAGR of 5.28% from 2025 to 2033. Essential to sectors like oil & gas, power generation, and chemical processing, DCS enhances operational efficiency and reliability through real-time data collection and automation. headline: 2 Dow Jones Stocks to Research Further and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: The Dow Jones (^DJI) is home to corporate giants, but size alone doesn’t guarantee success. A few of these companies are struggling with weak fundamentals, paradigm shifts, or poor execution.

headline: Aviation Test Equipment Market Report 2025-2033 - Global Air Traffic and MRO Growth Boosts the Need for Precise Diagnostic Tools with Technological Integration
summary: The Global Aviation Test Equipment Market is poised for robust growth, expanding from USD 7.5 billion in 2025 to USD 9.99 billion by 2033. Key drivers include technological advancements, increasing air travel, and stringent safety standards. The market sees innovations in testing equipment to meet demands from commercial and defense aviation sectors. The rise in global air traffic and MRO growth further boosts the need for precise diagnostic tools, while technological integration like AI and IoT
